description: CLI tool that validates Microsoft HTML Help Workshop (.hhp/.hhc/.hhk) project files by checking for missing source files, files referenced outside the project manifest, broken hyperlinks, non-HTML file references, and malformed local URLs.
status: build passes, five-step validation (HHP, HHC, HHK, HTML hyperlinks present + unlisted), unified reference processing, non-HTML file detection, case-insensitive string helpers, invalid URL detection

conventions.naming: Functions use snake_case with underscores for multi-word names (e.g. parse_HHP_section_FILES, Step01_ProcessFile_HHP, isLocalHref, extractHrefsFromFile)
conventions.file_structure: main.go + main.hhp_file.go + main.hhc_file.go + main.hhk_file.go + main.html_hyperlinks.go + main.strings_no_case.go, no packages beyond stdlib

exit_codes.1: Usage error or missing project files
exit_codes.2: One or more files are missing

key_changes_history: Renamed parseFilesSection -> parse_HHP_Files_Section
Replaced all HHT references with HHC (function names, variables, string literals, file extensions)
Removed unused code lines (user-directed)
Created README.md
Renamed parse_HHP_Files_Section -> parse_HHP_section_FILES
Added generic parse_HHP_section_OPTIONS for reading [OPTIONS] entries
HHC file now resolved from HHP [OPTIONS] Contents file entry instead of directory scan
Removed findHhcFile function (no longer needed)
parse_HHC_object_param_Local now strips #fragment suffixes from local refs
Step02_ProcessFile_HHC returns error only, prints incremental diff stats (+N missing, +N unlisted)
OutputFinalReport reformatted with ==== prefixes and conditional listing
Added HHK (index file) support: Step03_ProcessFile_HHK and parse_HHK_object_param_Local
HHK file resolved from HHP [OPTIONS] 'index file' entry
parse_HHK_object_param_Local collects ALL name='local' params per OBJECT (not just first)
Added sort import, OutputFinalReport now sorts missing and unlisted lists before printing
Added Step 4: hyperlink validation for present HTML files (isLocalHref, extractHrefsFromFile helpers)
Added Step 5: hyperlink validation for unlisted HTML files (mirrors Step 4 logic)
Added program banner with customizable ProgramName and Version constants
Fixed parse_HHK_object_param_Local: valueStartAbs was incorrectly used as absolute index into nameLower instead of relative index into remain
Simplified HHC & HHK parsing: removed .ToLower() conversion as resulting string was longer than original
Updated report output with ==== and ---- prefixes and conditional listing
Added strings_no_case.go with no_case_areCharsEqual, no_case_HasPrefix, no_case_IsEqual, no_case_SeekSubstring
Replaced all strings.Index calls with no_case_SeekSubstring for case-insensitive substring search
Added invalid/malformed URL tracking (invalid_list, invalid_ref_list, list_invalid_addIfNew) for detecting broken href values like '.', '..', or URLs ending in invalid characters
Added verifyHref function to centralize hyperlink validation logic with invalid URL detection
Split codebase into modular files: main.hhp_file.go, main.hhc_file.go, main.hhk_file.go, main.html_hyperlinks.go, main.strings_no_case.go
Hardcoded project_dir to v:\work\0-git\WinEPTS Tech. Ref (command-line argument commented out)
Added no_case_HasSuffix helper for case-insensitive suffix matching
Refactored no_case_HasPrefix to use new no_case_IsMatching core function
Created process_project_item_ref() as unified reference processor for all project items
Step01 (HHP) now classifies non-HTML files (images, etc.) as invalid references
Steps 02-03 (HHC/HHK) refactored to use process_project_item_ref instead of inline logic
Step04 hyperlink validation refactored: removed HTML-only filter, uses isHref_HTML_page + isHref_Local + process_project_item_ref
All five steps now share consistent reference classification via unified processing function

global_state.present: files listed in HHP [FILES] and found on disk
global_state.missing: files referenced (HHP/HHC/HHK/HTML hyperlinks) but not found on disk
global_state.unlisted: files found on disk and referenced in HHC/HHK/HTML hyperlinks but missing from HHP [FILES] section
global_state.invalid: malformed or invalid local URL values (e.g. '.', '..', trailing special characters) and non-HTML file references (e.g. images, PDFs)
